summary: Optional authoritative headless server package for multiplayer projects that deliberately choose that model.

source.provenance: descriptor-only; local addons source not present in this checkout

engineBoundary.notes: Dedicated authoritative mode is not the default networking model and should not be added to non-networked projects.

notes: Import addon server source only after provenance, license, API boundary, and manual build/run gates are reviewed.
Do not auto-bind ports or launch a listener from package install.
